subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! God willing, mayest thou dwell beneath the shade of the divine Lote-Tree and partake of its fruits, thy mention having reached the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمد انشاء الله در ظل سدره ربانیه ساکن باشی و باثمار آن متنعم ذکرت لدی العرش
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @exhortations and counsels
